title: CVE-2026-45469: Microsoft Excel RCE
summary: [P1] Microsoft Excel is vulnerable to remote code execution due to CVE-2026-45469. A patch is available for Microsoft Office for Mac. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability allows for remote code execution, which is a classic rce problem type, and it affects Microsoft Office applications.

enrichment.lede: CVE-2026-45469 Microsoft Excel Remote Code Execution Vulnerability.
